title: BTA Graves
description: Graves mod for Better than Adventure!
body:
# BTA Graves

Graves mod for Better than Adventure! 

Thanks to mayonaka8478 for the gravestone model.

## Features
- The gravestone shows your head/death message!
- The gravestone stores your items!
  - To get your items back you can either break it, or shift right click if you're the owner of the gravestone.
